contrast_label: C-pre - S-pre on J1 heart shift
interpretation: For first-pass heart shift vs baseline, Christian exceeds the matched secular control; the contrast shows a modest difference but the paired test remains weak.

contrast_label: C-pre - S-pre on J1 act shift
interpretation: For first-pass act shift vs baseline, Christian falls below the matched secular control; the contrast shows virtually no difference but the paired test remains weak.

contrast_label: C-post - S-post on raw explanation score
interpretation: For raw Christian/heart-language score, Christian falls below the matched secular control; the contrast shows a modest difference but the paired test remains weak.

contrast_label: C-post - S-post on controlled semantic score
interpretation: For lexical-controlled motive/heart semantic score, Christian falls below the matched secular control; the contrast shows a clearer difference but the paired test remains weak.

contrast_label: C-post - S-post on J1→J2 act revision
interpretation: For J1 to J2 act revision, Christian falls below the matched secular control; the contrast shows a modest difference but the paired test remains weak.

contrast_label: C-post - S-post on J1→J2 heart revision
interpretation: For J1 to J2 heart revision, Christian falls below the matched secular control; the contrast shows a modest difference but the paired test remains weak.
